item.title: Something's Off About This Truck Sale...
item.description: A look at a truck sale that seems unusual, highlighting red flags, concerns, and the investigation into what’s off about the deal.

media:content.media:title: Something's Off About This Truck Sale...
media:content.media:description: A look at a truck sale that seems unusual, highlighting red flags, concerns, and the investigation into what’s off about the deal.

item.title: College Kid Steals 2.2 Million Dollars
item.description: A factual overview of a case where a college student stole $2.2 million, highlighting the events, investigation, and consequences of the crime.

media:content.media:title: College Kid Steals 2.2 Million Dollars
media:content.media:description: A factual overview of a case where a college student stole $2.2 million, highlighting the events, investigation, and consequences of the crime.

item.title: Buying a Rare 1994 Truck 8,000 Miles Away!
item.description: A look at purchasing a rare 1994 truck from 8,000 miles away, highlighting the process, challenges, and excitement of securing a classic vehicle.

media:content.media:title: Buying a Rare 1994 Truck 8,000 Miles Away!
media:content.media:description: A look at purchasing a rare 1994 truck from 8,000 miles away, highlighting the process, challenges, and excitement of securing a classic vehicle.

item.title: Finding Forever Love with a Classic Camaro
item.description: A heartwarming story of connecting over a classic Camaro, exploring passion for cars and how it brought two people together.

media:content.media:title: Finding Forever Love with a Classic Camaro
media:content.media:description: A heartwarming story of connecting over a classic Camaro, exploring passion for cars and how it brought two people together.

item.title: It Pays To Know People
item.description: For Rob Pitts, knowing the right people wasn't just helpful — it was everything. He looked back at the connections that shaped his success.

media:content.media:title: It Pays To Know People
media:content.media:description: For Rob Pitts, knowing the right people wasn't just helpful — it was everything. He looked back at the connections that shaped his success.

item.title: How Family and Fate Play a Role
item.description: Rob Pitts reflected on the powerful role that family and fate played in shaping his journey — a heartfelt and deeply personal story.

media:content.media:title: How Family and Fate Play a Role
media:content.media:description: Rob Pitts reflected on the powerful role that family and fate played in shaping his journey — a heartfelt and deeply personal story.
